attributes.description: Alerts when `etcd_server_has_leader == 0`. The member cannot see a leader — quorum is lost or this member is partitioned.
attributes.name: [etcd OTel] No leader

investigation_guide.blob:
## etcd no leader

### What fired
A member reported `has_leader == 0` during the window.

### Why it matters
Without a leader, no writes are possible from this member. If the whole cluster lacks a leader, Kubernetes and other dependents are down.

### Triage
1. Check if only one member is affected (partition) vs whole cluster (quorum loss).
2. Inspect peer connectivity.
3. Look at recent restarts, config changes, and disk health.

### Remediation
- Restore peer connectivity / bring missing peers online.
- As last resort, run a disaster-recovery restore from snapshot.

### Tuning
- Always P1. Do not raise the threshold.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-etcd.otel-default*
// Member has no leader: network partition, quorum lost, or all members down
| WHERE etcd_server_has_leader IS NOT NULL
  AND etcd_server_has_leader == 0
// Group by instance for per-member alerting
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT count DESC
